links.title: Server: Next.js app metrics
links.tooltip: The pod-side counterpart — nextjs_* RED/memory/GC. Client (this dashboard) vs server (there): compare RUM TTFB against server request duration for the same route.

links.title: Networking / ingress
links.tooltip: ALB, ingress, and the Faro receiver's network path.

panels.title: RUM events (range)
panels.description: Total Faro signals (web-vitals, events, exceptions) ingested for the selected app(s)/env over the dashboard range. Zero ⇒ no RUM flowing — check the app's VITE_FARO_* build config and CORS allowlist.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" [$__range]))

panels.title: Sessions (range)
panels.description: Distinct browser sessions (unique session_id) seen in the range.

targets.expr: count(sum by (session_id) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | session_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Page loads (range)
panels.description: Full document navigations (faro.performance.navigation events).

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | event_name="faro.performance.navigation" [$__range]))

panels.title: JS errors (range)
panels.description: Browser exceptions captured by Faro (kind=exception).

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | kind="exception" [$__range]))

panels.title: Receiver ingest rate
panels.description: Alloy faro.receiver throughput (logs+measurements+exceptions+events per second). Pipeline-level — not split by app. Confirms the RUM ingestion path is alive.

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (rate(faro_receiver_logs_total[5m]) + rate(faro_receiver_measurements_total[5m]) + rate(faro_receiver_exceptions_total[5m]) + rate(faro_receiver_events_total[5m]))

panels.title: Receiver p95 latency
panels.description: p95 ingest request duration at the Faro receiver.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(faro_receiver_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])))

panels.title: LCP p75
panels.description: Largest Contentful Paint, 75th percentile. Good ≤ 2.5s, Poor > 4s.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp [$__range])

panels.title: INP p75
panels.description: Interaction to Next Paint, 75th percentile. Good ≤ 200ms, Poor > 500ms. Only emitted after a user interaction occurs.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | inp!="" | unwrap inp [$__range])

panels.title: CLS p75
panels.description: Cumulative Layout Shift, 75th percentile (unitless). Good ≤ 0.1, Poor > 0.25.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | cls!="" | unwrap cls [$__range])

panels.title: TTFB p75
panels.description: Time to First Byte, 75th percentile. Good ≤ 800ms.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | ttfb!="" | unwrap ttfb [$__range])

panels.title: FCP p75
panels.description: First Contentful Paint, 75th percentile. Good ≤ 1.8s.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | fcp!="" | unwrap fcp [$__range])
quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp [$__auto])
quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | inp!="" | unwrap inp [$__auto])
quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | ttfb!="" | unwrap ttfb [$__auto])
quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | fcp!="" | unwrap fcp [$__auto])
quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | cls!="" | unwrap cls [$__auto])

panels.title: Web Vitals rating distribution (good / needs-improvement / poor)
LCP rating split
panels.description: Faro's per-measurement context_rating for LCP. The share of 'good' is the headline CWV pass-rate.

targets.expr: sum by (context_rating) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | lcp!="" [$__range]))
sum by (context_rating) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | inp!="" [$__range]))
sum by (context_rating) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | cls!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: LCP p75 by page
panels.description: Worst Largest Contentful Paint per URL — where to optimise first.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp [$__range]) by (page_url)

panels.title: CLS p75 by page
panels.description: Worst Cumulative Layout Shift per URL — answers 'the rating says needs-improvement, but where?'. Good ≤ 0.1, poor > 0.25. Sort descending to find the shifting page, then reserve space for the late-loading image/embed/font causing it.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | type="web-vitals" | cls!="" | unwrap cls [$__range]) by (page_url)

panels.title: Page loads by page
panels.description: Navigation volume per URL in the range.

targets.expr: sum by (page_url) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | event_name="faro.performance.navigation" [$__range]))
sum by (type) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | kind="exception" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Recent exceptions
panels.description: Each line carries trace context — copy trace_id and pivot to Tempo.

targets.expr: {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | kind="exception"
sum by (browser_name) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | browser_name!="" [$__range]))
sum by (browser_os) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | browser_os!="" [$__range]))
sum by (browser_mobile) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | browser_mobile!="" [$__range]))
sum by (instance) (rate(faro_receiver_logs_total[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (instance) (rate(faro_receiver_measurements_total[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (instance) (rate(faro_receiver_exceptions_total[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (instance) (rate(faro_receiver_events_total[$__rate_interval]))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(faro_receiver_request_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(faro_receiver_request_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(faro_receiver_request_message_bytes_bucket[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: How to follow a slow page load

options.content:
**Pivot from RUM symptom → backend root cause:**

1. Spot a slow LCP/INP entry in the trend, or an exception in *Recent exceptions*.
2. Faro's `TracingInstrumentation` injects `traceparent` on same-origin/admin-api fetches — copy the `trace_id` from the log line.
3. Open **Tempo** with that `trace_id` → full waterfall: browser → SSR (`tucaken-app`) → `admin-api` → pg.
4. From any backend span, **Profile this span** → Pyroscope flame graph for the same window.

**Faro data model (for editing queries):** signals arrive as **logfmt** under `{job="faro"}`. The app is the in-line field `app_name` (`portfolio-frontend`, `portfolio-admin`), **not** a stream label. Web vitals are `type="web-vitals"` with one measurement per line keyed `lcp`/`inp`/`cls`/`ttfb`/`fcp` (+ `context_rating`). Errors are `kind="exception"`.

**tucaken (`portfolio-admin`) shows no data until** its RUM is enabled: SSM `/tucaken-app/{env}/vite/VITE_FARO_ENABLED=true` + `VITE_FARO_URL`, the tucaken host added to the Alloy `corsAllowedOrigins` allowlist, and a redeploy (these are baked in at `vite build`).

panels.title: Slow frontend traces (live — browser → SSR → admin-api)
panels.description: Live Tempo search for frontend/SSR traces slower than 300ms — the working version of the pivot described above. Click a Trace ID to open the full waterfall. Filters on Tempo resource.service.name (portfolio-frontend = browser RUM spans from Faro TracingInstrumentation; tucaken-app / nextjs-frontend = SSR), which differ from the Faro app_name used elsewhere, so this panel is intentionally not wired to $app.

panels.title: JS errors per session
panels.description: Exceptions ÷ distinct sessions over the range — a rate, not a raw count. The per-session denominator makes error volume comparable across traffic levels (10 errors is noise at 10k sessions, a fire at 5), which the raw counts in Rows 1/5 can't tell you.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | kind="exception" [$__range])) / count(sum by (session_id) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | session_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Client API p95 by endpoint (fetch spans)
panels.description: p95 wall-clock duration the browser observed for its own /api/* fetches (Faro faro.tracing.fetch → event_data_duration_ns). This is the client half of the BFF story: how a visitor experiences /api/chat, /api/resume/active, etc. — including network + queueing that server-side nextjs_* metrics never see. Filtered to URLs containing /api/ to drop RSC prefetch and third-party (analytics) noise.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.95, {job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | event_name="faro.tracing.fetch" | event_data_http_url=~".+/api/.+" | event_data_duration_ns!="" | unwrap event_data_duration_ns [$__range]) by (event_data_http_url)

panels.title: Client API calls by HTTP status
panels.description: Browser-observed outcome of /api/* fetches, bucketed by HTTP status. status=0 means the fetch never completed (network abort / CORS / timeout) — a failure class invisible to server metrics. A rise in 5xx/0 here is the client-side symptom of a BFF or upstream failure.

targets.expr: sum by (event_data_http_status_code) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | app_name=~"$app" | app_environment=~"$env" | event_name="faro.tracing.fetch" | event_data_http_url=~".+/api/.+" [$__auto]))
